title: Windows Account Discovery Commands
description: Detects commands used to enumerate user accounts and groups in Active Directory. Attackers perform account discovery to identify privileged accounts, service accounts, and domain administrators for targeting.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*net.exe' and ('Command Line' like '*user /domain*' or 'Command Line' like '*group /domain*' or 'Command Line' like '*localgroup administrators*')) or ('Process Name' like '*net1.exe' and ('Command Line' like '*user /domain*' or 'Command Line' like '*group /domain*')) or (('Command Line' like '*Get-ADUser*' or 'Command Line' like '*Get-ADGroup*' or 'Command Line' like '*Get-ADGroupMember*' or 'Command Line' like '*Get-LocalUser*' or 'Command Line' like '*Get-LocalGroupMember*')) or ('Process Name' like '*dsquery.exe'))
